items_all.title: GTA 3 and Vice City are now playable inside San Andreas — a mod lets you revisit Liberty City and Vice City without leaving San Andreas
items_all.summary: A GTA modder has embedded GTA 3 and Vice City within San Andreas, even nesting Vice City within GTA 3, with all three games continuing to run simultaneously.
items_all.title_original: GTA 3 and Vice City are now playable inside San Andreas — a mod lets you revisit Liberty City and Vice City without leaving San Andreas
items_all.title_en: GTA 3 and Vice City are now playable inside San Andreas — a mod lets you revisit Liberty City and Vice City without leaving San Andreas
items_all.title_bilingual: GTA 3 and Vice City are now playable inside San Andreas — a mod lets you revisit Liberty City and Vice City without leaving San Andreas
items_all.summary_zh: GTA 改装者已将 GTA 3 和罪恶都市嵌入到圣安地列斯，甚至将罪恶都市嵌套在 GTA 3 中，所有三款游戏继续同时运行。

items_all.title: AMD’s new Ryzen 7 7700X3D plummets to $279 days after launch — the X3D chip rules the mid-range at its discounted price
items_all.summary: The Ryzen 7 7700X3D has suddenly become a solid value thanks to a $50 promo code, knocking its price down from $329 to just $279 on Newegg.
items_all.title_original: AMD’s new Ryzen 7 7700X3D plummets to $279 days after launch — the X3D chip rules the mid-range at its discounted price
items_all.title_en: AMD’s new Ryzen 7 7700X3D plummets to $279 days after launch — the X3D chip rules the mid-range at its discounted price
items_all.title_zh: AMD 新款 Ryzen 7 7700X3D 上市几天后暴跌至 279 美元——X3D 芯片以折扣价统治中端市场
items_all.title_bilingual: AMD 新款 Ryzen 7 7700X3D 上市几天后暴跌至 279 美元——X3D 芯片以折扣价统治中端市场 / AMD’s new Ryzen 7 7700X3D plummets to $279 days after launch — the X3D chip rules the mid-range at its discounted price
items_all.summary_zh: 由于 50 美元的促销代码，Ryzen 7 7700X3D 突然变得物有所值，将其在 Newegg 上的价格从 329 美元降至 279 美元。

items_all.title: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items_all.summary: TrashBench recently decided to test whether adding more and more fans to a powerful GPU would improve its performance.
items_all.title_original: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items_all.title_en: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items_all.title_bilingual: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items_all.summary_zh: TrashBench 最近决定测试为强大的 GPU 添加越来越多的风扇是否会提高其性能。

items_all.title: Jurassic Park packed $4 million of legit 1993 computer hardware — a software engineer detailed every single piece of hardware in the film
items_all.summary: Google software engineer Fabien Sanglard meticulously listed the computer hardware and software used in the first Jurassic Park film. He even added details for each device, turning the film into something of a computer museum.
items_all.title_original: Jurassic Park packed $4 million of legit 1993 computer hardware — a software engineer detailed every single piece of hardware in the film
items_all.title_en: Jurassic Park packed $4 million of legit 1993 computer hardware — a software engineer detailed every single piece of hardware in the film
items_all.title_bilingual: Jurassic Park packed $4 million of legit 1993 computer hardware — a software engineer detailed every single piece of hardware in the film
items_all.summary_zh: 谷歌软件工程师 Fabien Sanglard 精心列出了第一部侏罗纪公园电影中使用的计算机硬件和软件。他甚至为每台设备添加了细节，将影片变成了一个计算机博物馆。

items_all.title: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items_all.summary: Newegg has a great combo bundle on sale with over $100 in savings for the fastest DDR4 gaming system you can build today. It pairs a Ryzen 7 5800X3D with 16GB of CL16 DDR4-3200 RAM and an Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II motherboard.
items_all.title_original: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items_all.title_en: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items_all.title_bilingual: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items_all.summary_zh: Newegg 提供超值组合捆绑销售，可节省 100 多美元，打造您今天可以构建的最快 DDR4 游戏系统。它搭配 Ryzen 7 5800X3D 和 16GB CL16 DDR4-3200 RAM 以及 Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II 主板。

items_all.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items_all.summary: The 3GB GDDR7 chips that the RTX 50 Super GPUs will use reportedly cost twice to thrice as much as the 2GB chips found on vanilla RTX 50-series graphics cards. This would likely push the retail price of these GPUs way beyond Nvidia's target MSRP.
items_all.title_original: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items_all.title_en: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items_all.title_bilingual: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items_all.summary_zh: 据报道，RTX 50 Super GPU 将使用的 3GB GDDR7 芯片的成本是普通 RTX 50 系列显卡上的 2GB 芯片的两倍到三倍。这可能会使这些 GPU 的零售价格远远超出 Nvidia 的目标建议零售价。

items_all.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items_all.summary: ‘The Jensen Jacket’ achieved a hammer price of $960,000 this weekend.
items_all.title_original: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items_all.title_en: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items_all.title_bilingual: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items_all.summary_zh: “Jensen 夹克”本周末的成交价为 96 万美元。

items_all.title: Security engineer ports password cracker hashcat to Gameboy Advance — 16.8 MHz chip can perform a meager 727 hashes a second, 30 million times slower than a modern rig
items_all.summary: Gameboy Advance port of hashcat allows for advanced password cracking in meager hardware — so long as you're willing to wait
items_all.title_original: Security engineer ports password cracker hashcat to Gameboy Advance — 16.8 MHz chip can perform a meager 727 hashes a second, 30 million times slower than a modern rig
items_all.title_en: Security engineer ports password cracker hashcat to Gameboy Advance — 16.8 MHz chip can perform a meager 727 hashes a second, 30 million times slower than a modern rig
items_all.title_bilingual: Security engineer ports password cracker hashcat to Gameboy Advance — 16.8 MHz chip can perform a meager 727 hashes a second, 30 million times slower than a modern rig
items_all.summary_zh: hashcat 的 Gameboy Advance 端口允许在简陋的硬件中进行高级密码破解 - 只要您愿意等待

items_all.title: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items_all.summary: The AGI AI828 is a budget drive with subpar performance and power efficiency. This makes it a last resort, although in the current market, it might be good enough for some.
items_all.title_original: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items_all.title_en: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items_all.title_zh: AGI AI828 SSD评测：预算有限的人的最后选择
items_all.title_bilingual: AGI AI828 SSD评测：预算有限的人的最后选择 / AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items_all.summary_zh: AGI AI828 是一款性能和能效均低于标准的预算驱动器。这使得它成为最后的手段，尽管在当前市场上，它对于某些人来说可能已经足够好了。

items_all.title: Korean outfit hosting 1.44MB game development contest to honor the floppy disk — entrants must confine entire fileset, including resources, engine, and library, to miniscule storage format
items_all.summary: There’s a new 'open to everyone' floppy disk-size game development competition with cash prizes for the best three submissions.
items_all.title_original: Korean outfit hosting 1.44MB game development contest to honor the floppy disk — entrants must confine entire fileset, including resources, engine, and library, to miniscule storage format
items_all.title_en: Korean outfit hosting 1.44MB game development contest to honor the floppy disk — entrants must confine entire fileset, including resources, engine, and library, to miniscule storage format
items_all.title_bilingual: Korean outfit hosting 1.44MB game development contest to honor the floppy disk — entrants must confine entire fileset, including resources, engine, and library, to miniscule storage format
items_all.summary_zh: 新推出了“向所有人开放”的软盘大小的游戏开发竞赛，提交的最佳三项作品将获得现金奖励。

items_all.title: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet
items_all.summary: A micro-drone designed to locate and eradicate mosquitoes has passed an important milestone with its first recorded air-to-air kill.
items_all.title_original: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet
items_all.title_en: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet
items_all.title_bilingual: Autonomous micro-drone achieves first air-to-air insect kill on the way 'towards completely eradicating mosquitoes' — 40-gram unit uses car parking sensors, can eliminate insects at up to 26 feet
items_all.summary_zh: 一款旨在定位和消灭蚊子的微型无人机首次实现空对空消灭蚊子记录，这是一个重要的里程碑。
